REMITTITUR FILED THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS NO ERROR IN THE RECORD PRE- JUDICIAL TO EITHER THE APPELLANT OR CROOS-APPELLANT. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THE THE JUDGMENT MADE & ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT, CCSF, IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED CAUSE IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. THE POST-JUDGMENT ORDER AWARDING FEES AND COSTS IN THE SAME ACTION IS ALSO AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO RULES OF COURT, RULE 135(A), EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS.
